description: Create a weekly GitHub Actions workflow named ptf-ebpf-kernels-weekly that runs every Sunday at 1:17 am UTC. The workflow should only trigger for the main branch of the p4lang/p4c repository. It should have three jobs: build-p4c to build a P4C docker image, build-ubuntu-2004 to build a VM image for Ubuntu 20.04, and ptf-ubuntu-2004 to run PTF tests for eBPF backend on multiple kernel versions.
